subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Experience hath shown that life in this mortal world possesseth neither merit nor sweetness, and the garden of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بتجربه رسیده که زندگانی این عالم را مزیت و حلاوتی نه و گلسان حیات
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
